nasb.text: Surely there was no one like Ahab who sold himself to do evil in the sight of the Lord, because Jezebel his wife incited him.

esv.text: (There was none who sold himself to do what was evil in the sight of the Lord like Ahab, whom Jezebel his wife incited.

cnv.text: 只是從來沒有人像亞哈的；他受了他妻子耶洗別的引誘，出賣了他自己，行耶和華看為惡的事。

ccb.text: 从来没有人像亚哈那样受妻子耶洗别唆使，一心做耶和华视为恶的事。
